name: years_experience
description: Total professional experience as years + months, computed from the work history date ranges

properties.name: years
properties.description: Whole years of professional experience

properties.name: months
properties.description: Additional months beyond the whole years (0-11)

name: projects
description: Projects the candidate built or contributed to

properties.name: name
properties.description: Project name or short title

properties.name: description
properties.description: What the project does / the candidate's contribution

properties.name: technologies
properties.description: Tools, languages, or frameworks used

properties.name: metrics
properties.description: Quantitative results reported for the project, each as a short string (e.g. '78.58% accuracy', 'F1 0.91', '110,414 samples', '5,000+ annotations')

properties.name: start_date
properties.description: When the program started (as written, e.g. '09/2023', 'Sept 2021')

properties.name: end_date
properties.description: When the program ended, as written (e.g. '2025', 'present', 'expected 2027'); use 'present' for ongoing programs

properties.name: graduation_year
properties.description: Completion/graduation year ONLY. Leave null if the program is ongoing ('present'/'current') or the year is not stated — never copy the start year here

name: languages
description: Spoken/written human languages the candidate knows (not programming languages)

properties.name: name
properties.description: Language name, e.g. 'English', 'Urdu'

properties.name: proficiency
properties.description: Stated proficiency level, e.g. 'C2', 'Native', 'Fluent', 'A1'

name: certifications
description: Professional certifications, licenses, or credentials the candidate has earned

properties.name: name
properties.description: Certification/credential name

properties.name: issuer
properties.description: Issuing organization, if stated

properties.name: year
properties.description: Year obtained, if stated

name: activities
description: Memberships, extracurriculars, volunteering, or notable non-work activities (e.g. society memberships, campus initiatives)

properties.name: name
properties.description: Activity, role, or membership name

properties.name: organization
properties.description: Associated organization or society, if any

properties.name: description
properties.description: What the activity involved, if described

name: references
description: People listed as references for the candidate

properties.name: name
properties.description: Reference's full name

properties.name: title
properties.description: Their title/role and affiliation, if stated

properties.name: contact
properties.description: Their email or phone, if stated
